message:
✨ Enhance build monitor with smart error handling

- Track notifications per commit (avoid spam, notify on new commits)
- Count failures and escalate messaging after 3+ attempts
- Add ai-stuck label + @clubanderson mention after 5+ failures
- Include file list and TypeScript guidance in notifications
- Auto-fix DCO on every build failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
